title: MKB 15M Garden Hose Pipe Reinforced PVC Anti Kick Outdoor Hosepipe
features: Multifunction Water Hose： This garden hose pipe is suitable for all standard garden hoses, ideal for watering gardens, lawn, flower beds, washing cars, cleaning windows or showering dogs and pets. Strong and durable, scratch resistant and frost free. To meet all your watering needs. To prolong the life of the water pipe, please avoid leaving it exposed to the sun for long periods of time

Sturdy and Strippable: Durable outer layer to resist abrasion and mildew; the mesh reinforcement layer that cannot be easily deformed; the reinforced middle layer to provide extra strength; prevents corrosion, knots, wear and tear and other possible damage, makes the product stronger and more durable, extends the service life

Pressure Washer: The pressure washer attachment turns your flexi hose into a powerful cleaning tool. By harnessing the water pressure, this attachment delivers a high-pressure stream that can tackle stubborn dirt, grime, and debris from various surfaces, such as driveways, patio furniture, or garden walls. It offers a quick and effective way to maintain the cleanliness of your outdoor spaces

Easy to Set Up: No need to wall mount an enclosure or carry around a heavy hose reel. Simply attach the hosepipe to a matching tap connector and spray away. Use the garden hose pipe for watering the garden, cleaning windows, washing cars, and any other outdoor watering tasks
description: 15M Meter Garden Hose Pipe Made with reinforced PVC, Garden Hose is one that’s built for extra strength. This hose is perfect for watering the garden, cleaning doors and windows and washing vehicles. With a length of 15m and a 12mm diameter, you can be assured that this hose is suitable for most standard hose pipe fittings. Ideal Product: Use the garden hose pipe for watering the garden, cleaning windows, washing cars, and any other outdoor watering tasks Premium Quality: The hose pipe is made up of reinforced PVC that offers extra strength and is very easy to clean Compatible: This 15m garden hose can be used with most standard hose pipe fittings Durable and Reliable: Our hose is built to withstand daily use and extreme weather conditions, ensuring years of dependable performance A quality constructed heavy duty garden hose. Ideal for all your gardening, vehicle cleaning, patio cleaning and many more indoor / outdoor chores. Constructed from reinforced PVC polyester fiber and features a 3 layer construction for added durability. Perfect hose for household or professional use that you can buy with confidence. Features : Size: 15 Meter Inner pipe diameter: 12mm (1/2”) Reinforced PVC polyester fiber pipe Temperature range -5 to +65°C Has a 3 ply/layer construction Kink resistant Easy to clean Colour: Green Package Included: 1 x 15M Meter Garden Hose Pipe
